description: record_search that CONSTRAINS on the Americanized farm-name surname 'Moen' returns nil — the Norwegian christening indexes the child under his father's patronymic, not the farm name the family adopted in the US, so a surname-anchored Norwegian church search finds nothing. Matched on surname~Moen so it fires for any search that keeps 'Moen' as the surname. Guards the patronymic carve-out: keeping the farm surname is the wrong move. Ordered before the parent-anchored hit fixture so a surname-constrained query nils first (prompting the skill to drop the surname and re-anchor).
